parameters.command:
echo "=== MEMORY ==="
free -m
echo "=== DISK ==="
df -h /
echo "=== CONTAINERS ==="
docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}"
echo "=== STATS ==="
docker stats --no-stream --format "{{.Name}}: {{.CPUPerc}} | {{.MemUsage}}"
echo "=== BACKUPS ==="
ls -lh /var/backups/db/

parameters.jsonBody:
